records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone looks happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone looks happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone looks happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. All their eyes are on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. All their eyes are on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. All their eyes are on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. I would have to disagree. I do not think this clothing is that attention-grabbing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. I would have to disagree. I do not think this clothing is that attention-grabbing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. I would have to disagree. I do not think this clothing is that attention-grabbing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you enjoy the previous rides?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you enjoy the previous rides?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you enjoy the previous rides?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I did not think you would like the merry-go-round and Ferris wheel as much as you did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I did not think you would like the merry-go-round and Ferris wheel as much as you did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I did not think you would like the merry-go-round and Ferris wheel as much as you did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was nice to take a moment to sit, feel the breeze, and look around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was nice to take a moment to sit, feel the breeze, and look around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was nice to take a moment to sit, feel the breeze, and look around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You had a huge smile on your face as you excitedly looked around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You had a huge smile on your face as you excitedly looked around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You had a huge smile on your face as you excitedly looked around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem... Well, it was very enjoyable...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem... Well, it was very enjoyable...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem... Well, it was very enjoyable...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps I have been pushing myself too hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps I have been pushing myself too hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps I have been pushing myself too hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I finally realized that small breaks like this can bring happiness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I finally realized that small breaks like this can bring happiness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I finally realized that small breaks like this can bring happiness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. I am proud of you for realizing that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. I am proud of you for realizing that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. I am proud of you for realizing that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Ah, I see waffles over there. Would you like to try one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Ah, I see waffles over there. Would you like to try one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Ah, I see waffles over there. Would you like to try one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huah. That was good. I do not think I will ever get tired of that taste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huah. That was good. I do not think I will ever get tired of that taste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huah. That was good. I do not think I will ever get tired of that taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are... a lot of delicious treats.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are... a lot of delicious treats.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are... a lot of delicious treats.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Attention all guests and visitors.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Attention all guests and visitors.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Attention all guests and visitors.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The fireworks will begin shortly.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The fireworks will begin shortly.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The fireworks will begin shortly.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Attention all guests and visitors...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Attention all guests and visitors...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Attention all guests and visitors...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister, would you like to see it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister, would you like to see it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister, would you like to see it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I presume it would feel quite different from the ones we see from the house.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I presume it would feel quite different from the ones we see from the house.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I presume it would feel quite different from the ones we see from the house.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where would be a good place to view it? Shall we look?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where would be a good place to view it? Shall we look?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where would be a good place to view it? Shall we look?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you Counters? You can win a prize here if you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you Counters? You can win a prize here if you are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you Counters? You can win a prize here if you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A prize?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A prize?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A prize?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup! These are score-tracking devices made especially for Counters!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! These are score-tracking devices made especially for Counters!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! These are score-tracking devices made especially for Counters!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration is testing this hologram battle simulator for the festival.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration is testing this hologram battle simulator for the festival.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration is testing this hologram battle simulator for the festival.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can choose your prize depending on your score after clearing all the waves!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can choose your prize depending on your score after clearing all the waves!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can choose your prize depending on your score after clearing all the waves!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my! It looks like this adorable little lady is here with her older sister! How old are you, little lady?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my! It looks like this adorable little lady is here with her older sister! How old are you, little lady?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my! It looks like this adorable little lady is here with her older sister! How old are you, little lady?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, um, this is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, um, this is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, um, this is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are really strong, right, <color=#ffd34c>sis?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are really strong, right, <color=#ffd34c>sis?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are really strong, right, <color=#ffd34c>sis?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right? <color=#ffd34c>Sis</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right? <color=#ffd34c>Sis</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right? <color=#ffd34c>Sis</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have a team of medics for possible injuries as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have a team of medics for possible injuries as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have a team of medics for possible injuries as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you don't have to worry about your sister getting hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you don't have to worry about your sister getting hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you don't have to worry about your sister getting hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, <color=#ffd34c>sis</color>. You <color=#ffd34c>can defeat</color> all of them, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, <color=#ffd34c>sis</color>. You <color=#ffd34c>can defeat</color> all of them, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, <color=#ffd34c>sis</color>. You <color=#ffd34c>can defeat</color> all of them, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not dangerous, so no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not dangerous, so no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not dangerous, so no need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was actually thinking that I needed to move my body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was actually thinking that I needed to move my body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was actually thinking that I needed to move my body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also wanted to check how stretchable this dress was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also wanted to check how stretchable this dress was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also wanted to check how stretchable this dress was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First Instructor of the Nanahara Style, Nanahara Chifuyu. Challenge accepted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First Instructor of the Nanahara Style, Nanahara Chifuyu. Challenge accepted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First Instructor of the Nanahara Style, Nanahara Chifuyu. Challenge accepted.
